mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_reports (reporter_id, target_type, target_id, reason, status, created_at) VALUES (#{reporterId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{reason}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT fr.*, u.nickname AS reporter_nickname FROM forum_reports fr JOIN users u ON u.id = fr.reporter_id WHERE fr.id = #{id}

SELECT fr.*, u.nickname AS reporter_nickname FROM forum_reports fr JOIN users u ON u.id = fr.reporter_id WHERE fr.status = #{status} ORDER BY CASE WHEN fr.status = 'pending' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, fr.created_at DESC, fr.id DESC
